column1: # /Data Parse — split a column of long labels into typed fields
#   L  = start of a Label field
#   V  = start of a Value field
#   D  = start of a Date field   (stored as a label for now)
#   T  = start of a Time field   (stored as a label for now)
# This transcript skips Format-Line Create — the user types the
#   /DP I  → Input-Column POINT (range includes the format-line row)
#   /DP G  → split each subsequent label by the format-line slots
# I = Input-Column → POINT A1..A4 → Enter → back to Parse menu.
